zh.lifeSummary: 當Rey Luis X de Francia於1289年10月4日出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲時，他的父親Philip IV Roi de France21歲，母親Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France16歲。他於1305年9月23日與Princesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarra在法國i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌可貝爾-頌結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1316年6月5日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-德-馬內文斯享年26歲，埋葬在法國瑟沙吉登尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rey Luis X de Francia于1289年10月4日出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲时，他的父亲Philip IV Roi de France21岁，母亲Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France16岁。他于1305年9月23日与Princesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarra在法国i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌可貝爾-頌结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1316年6月5日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-德-馬內文斯享年26岁，埋葬在法国瑟沙吉登尼斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Francia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Alejandro, Alberto, Angelico, Candelario, Fidencio, Jesus, Juan, Manuel, Margarito, Maximo, Nilo.  Italian Federico, Marco, Rocco, Romeo, Salvatore.

Italian and Spanish: literally ‘France’, hence an ethnic name denoting a Frenchman. However, Francia is also found in Renaissance Italy as a personal name (both male and female), and in some instances the surname may be from this use.
Hungarian: ethnicname for a Frenchman, from francia ‘French’.

variants.name: Frangella
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Gilda, Nicola, Ottavio, Silvestro.  Spanish Alfonso, Jaime, Luis.
Italian: possibly from a feminine diminutive of   Francia   or   Franco  .

variants.name: Francione
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Adelmo, Gino, Mario, Orlando, Salvatore.
Italian: from an augmentative of   Francia  .

variants.name: Franza
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Alfredo, Eliodoro, Emilio, Giorgio, Lorenzo, Lucio, Orfeo, Rocco.
Italian (Lombardy): from a derivative of the personal name Francesco (see Francis ).

nameMeanings.name: Luis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Louis  , also used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Louis
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

en.lifeSummary: When Rey Luis X de Francia was born on 4 October 1289, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, his father, Philip IV Roi de France, was 21 and his mother, Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France, was 16. He married Princesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarra on 23 September 1305, in Corbeil-Essonne, Essonne, Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 5 June 1316, in Vincennes, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 26, and was buried in Saint-Denis, Seine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rey Luis X de Francia est né le 4 octobre 1289, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, son père, Philip IV Roi de France, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Princesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarra le 23 septembre 1305, à Corbeil-Essonne, Essonne, Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 5 juin 1316, à Vincennes, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Denis, Seine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rey Luis X de Francia am 4. Oktober 1289 in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philip IV Roi de France 21 und seine Mutter Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France 16. Er hat am 23. September 1305 in Corbeil-Essonne, Essonne, Île-de-France, Frankreich Princesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarra geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 5. Juni 1316 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Vincennes, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Denis, Seine, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rey Luis X de Francia è nato il il 4 ottobre 1289 nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Philip IV Roi de France, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Princesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarra il 23 settembre 1305, nel Corbeil-Essonne, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 5 giugno 1316, nel Vincennes, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 26 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Denis, Seine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Rey Luis X de Franciaが1289年10月4日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで生まれた時，父Philip IV Roi de Franceは21歳，母Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de Franceは16歳であった。1305年9月23日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスエソンコルベイル-エソンでPrincesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarraと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1316年6月5日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-デ-マルンヴィンセンスで26歳で死去し，フランスセアインサイント-デニスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rey Luis X de Francia(이)가 1289년 10월 4일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip IV Roi de France(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1305년 9월 23일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 에손 코르브이-손에서 Princesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarra(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1316년 6월 5일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-데-마니 빈스네스에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세이인 세인트-데니스에 묻혔다.

pt.04 October 1289–05 June 1316: 4 de outubro de 1289–5 de junho de 1316
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rey Luis X de Francia nasceu em 4 de outubro de 1289, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Philip IV Roi de France, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Princesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarra em 23 de setembro de 1305, em Corbeil-Essonne, Essonne, Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 5 de junho de 1316, em Vincennes, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, França, com 26 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Denis, Seine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rey Luis X de Francia родился 4 октября 1289 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Philip IV Roi de France было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Princesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarra 23 сентября 1305 г. в местности корбил-ессонн, эссонн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 5 июня 1316 г. в местности винценнесь, вал-де-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 26 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-денис, син, Франция.

es.04 October 1289–05 June 1316: 4 de octubre de 1289–5 de junio de 1316
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rey Luis X de Francia nació el 4 de octubre de 1289, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Philip IV Roi de France, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Princesa Margarita de Borgoña Reina Consorte de Francia y Navarra el 23 de septiembre de 1305, en Corbeil-Essonne, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 5 de junio de 1316, en Vincennes, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 26 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Denis, Seine, Francia.
